workflow_instructions: At the START of each new issue cycle (when LOOP_TICK fires): 1) invoke /clear to reset context window. 2) Read this file. 3) Check open PRs ready to merge. 4) Pick lowest eligible issue (ID>5, no blocked/human-in-the-loop/in-progress labels). 5) TDD workflow per .claude/skills/tdd.md. 6) QA per .agents/skills/qa/SKILL.md. 7) Open PR, monitor CI (poll every 2 min with mcp__github__pull_request_read get_check_runs), merge when green, close issue. 8) Set active:false, update this file.
next_action: Implement issue #201 — Puzzle attempts API + best-attempts badge.
